title: Diamond Recycling
description: Recycle diamond tools, diamond armor, and smithing templates into diamonds through crafting.
body:
Recycle old diamond tools and armor and excess smithing templates into diamonds. To keep it balanced, you need seven diamond tools or four smithing templates/armor pieces for each diamond.

### notblue's recycling packs
- [Better Gold Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-gold-recycling)
- [Better Iron Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-iron-recycling)
- [Copper Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-recycling)
- [Netherite Recycling](https://modrinth.com/datapack/netherite-recycling)
